summary: Iteration 24: Complete testing of AI visitor instructions feature. Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED. Frontend: ALL features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/ai-instructions returns JSON with hub_name, goal, quickstart, patterns, operating_notes, api_endpoints
Backend GET /api/v1/ai-instructions returns identical JSON payload
Static GET /ai-instructions.txt returns plain text guide with all sections
Splash screen shows AI guide summary with endpoint references (/api/ai-instructions and /ai-instructions.txt)
Hub page has permanent 'Hide AI guide' / 'Help for AI' toggle button with data-testid='hub-toggle-ai-guide-button'
AI Visitor Guide Panel has data-testid='ai-visitor-guide-panel' with human and agent blocks
Guide panel content updates dynamically by active tab (registry, instantiation, runs, responses, chat)
Guide panel shows hybrid style with 'Human Quickstep' and 'Agent Protocol' blocks
Machine-readable instructions section shows both /api/ai-instructions and /ai-instructions.txt endpoints
First-time users see guide panel by default, localStorage key 'aimmh-ai-guide-seen-v1' tracks seen state
All 5 tabs render correctly with no regressions: Registry, Model & Group Instantiation, Rooms/Runs/Orders & Prompts, Responses, Chat & Synthesis

test_credentials.note: Fresh users registered for each test session

seed_data_creation: Test users created during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested AI visitor instructions feature. All backend endpoints working: /api/ai-instructions (JSON), /api/v1/ai-instructions (JSON), /ai-instructions.txt (plain text). Frontend splash screen shows AI guide summary with endpoint references. Hub page has permanent 'Help for AI' toggle button (data-testid='hub-toggle-ai-guide-button'). AI Visitor Guide Panel shows tab-specific content with human and agent blocks. Guide panel visibility controlled by localStorage key 'aimmh-ai-guide-seen-v1'. All tabs render correctly with no regressions.

details.test_api_ai_instructions_json_has_patter: PASS - Contains 6 orchestration patterns (fan_out, daisy_chain, room_all, room_synthesized, council, roleplay)
details.test_api_ai_instructions_json_has_api_en: PASS - Contains health, ready, hub_base, registry endpoints
details.test_api_v1_ai_instructions_matches_api_: PASS - Both endpoints return identical data
details.test_ai_instructions_txt_returns_200: PASS - Returns 200 with text/plain content type
details.test_ai_instructions_txt_contains_guide_: PASS - Contains AIMMH Hub, Goal, Quickstart, Patterns, Operating Notes

details.ai_guide_summary: Found at [data-testid='hub-splash-ai-guide-summary'] - 'Persistent isolated instances, nested groups, staged runs, and synthesis workflows. For agents: instantiate, run, compare, synthesize.'

details.ai_guide_toggle_button: Found at [data-testid='hub-toggle-ai-guide-button'] - Text toggles between 'Hide AI guide' and 'Help for AI'
details.guide_title: Found at [data-testid='ai-visitor-guide-title'] - Updates by active tab

details.guide_toggle_hide: Panel hidden successfully, button text changes to 'Help for AI'

details.registry_tab: Renders API keys and Registry sections
details.chat_tab: Renders Direct multi-instance chat and Synthesis workspace

Hub page: Guide panel content updates by active tab
